new_classes.label_en: Other wine, other (subheading 2204 29 96) – non-PDO/PGI/Tokaj, non-semi-sparkling wine in containers > 2 L, n.e.s.
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Wein, anderer (Unterposition 2204 29 96) – Wein ohne g.U./g.g.A./Tokajer, nicht perlend, in Behältnissen > 2 L, anderweitig nicht genannt
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes in containers holding more than 2 litres, not bearing a Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) or Protected Geographical Indication (PGI), not classified as Tokaj, and not semi-sparkling; the non-volatile constituents of the total dry extract include sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts (see additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22). This is the residual 'other' category within subheading 2204 29 for large-container still wines.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the four main distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 29 96: (1) wine of fresh grapes in large containers (> 2 L) via BFO has_part some LargeContainer; (2) absence of PDO/PGI quality (complement restriction); (3) absence of Tokaj PDO quality (complement restriction); (4) absence of semi-sparkling pressure quality (complement restriction); (5) reference to the non-volatile dry extract quality required by additional notes 4 and 5 of Chapter 22. The coverage is reduced to 0.75 because: (a) the complement restrictions in OWL DL are modelled as nominal complements on rdf:type rather than as proper qualified cardinality or intersection-of-complement expressions, which is a modelling simplification; (b) additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22 specify detailed quantitative thresholds for dry extract constituents (e.g. grams per litre of sugars, total dry extract measured at specific temperature) that are not numerically captured here because the exact threshold values are found in the additional notes but are not reproduced in the supplied legal text excerpt; (c) the 'n.e.s.' (not elsewhere specified) catch-all character of this subheading cannot be fully formalised in OWL without exhaustive enumeration of all sibling subheadings.
